title: Redmi Note 13 Series Vodacom bundles are more than just a new phone this Mother’s Day
description: BUSINESS NEWS - 12 May is Mother's Day...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - 12 May is Mother's Day in South Africa, and if you've been waiting to find that perfect gift, it is here now in the form of a Redmi Note 13 Series bundle from Vodacom.

Right now you can pick up a new phone and turn that one purchase into a bundle deal by adding only R9 extra per month to unlock a smart wearable from Xiaomi.


> For the high-tech moms who are always looking for a new gadget to the moms who have always wanted to try their first, this is the perfect way to give her something smart on her wrist for such a great deal.


Increase that to an extra R29 per month instead, and you unlock a wide range of smart home appliances and Robot Vacuum options. With the robot vacuums, you can mop and vacuum the floors without lifting a finger, cook remotely with Xiaomi Smart Air Fryers, and even take control of the local environment with a selection of fans and other climate control devices.

While it’s your mom and your choice when picking up your bundle, our favourite of the bunch is the Robot Vacuums. They’re one of the best ways to reduce stress at home by freeing up time that is usually used for cleaning and even if mom already has a stringent cleaning regime, the Robot Vacuum can always be programmed to do exactly what she needs to make the regime even better.

These robot vacuums are already some of the most impressive smart home devices, and for just R29 per month, including a Redmi Note 13 Series, the price has never been better.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
